diagnosis: The player completed the level in ~12 minutes with 9 deaths and 23 hits taken, indicating a challenging but ultimately beatable experience. The trace shows extensive backtracking and repeated returns to spawn (x=80), suggesting navigation confusion in the vertical maze of ladders (L) and platforms. Combat deaths cluster around x=764-1814 (mid-level corridors) and x=2617 (upper areas), with the player exploiting vertical sightlines to kill enemies from different elevations — a design flaw where level geometry allows unfair engagement. The 5/5 rating despite criticism suggests the core combat loop is engaging but the level structure enables cheese strategies.

lessons.lesson: Vertical level layouts with overlapping sightlines between tiers allow players to trivialize combat by attacking enemies from safe elevations outside intended engagement zones.
conditions: enemies placed on platforms with clear vertical sightlines to other tiers
no line-of-sight blockers or engagement range limits
lessons.outcome: player kills enemies from different level tiers without risk, bypassing intended combat challenge
